response.justification: Substantially exceeds experience requirement with 14+ years of full-stack development and currently serving as Staff Engineer working directly on TypeScript/Node.js with AI agent infrastructure. Tech stack alignment is strong across primary requirements (TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS, Docker, Kubernetes). Main gap is specific testing framework expertise (Jest, Vitest, Playwright) not documented, though TDD culture is evident from previous roles and teaching experience.
strengths: 14+ years full-stack experience far exceeds 6+ year requirement with multiple senior/staff-level roles
Currently working on AI agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks in TypeScript/Node.js matching core role needs
Proven architecture and engineering skills across web, mobile, embedded systems with strong open-source contributions
concerns: Testing framework specificity (Jest, Vitest, Playwright) not explicitly mentioned despite being required technical skill
Nest.js not mentioned; while extensive Node.js experience exists, specific framework use unclear
Authentication, authorization, and security best practices not highlighted in experience despite being required knowledge

key_factors.factor: Current AI agent and full-stack TypeScript/Node.js role
